events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's big day
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo on drums or vocals?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Rock God's Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May! What's your favourite Queen riff he gave us?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's still got it
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still strutting! Happy birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger. What's your all-time favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: Remembering MTV's debut
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed the game, kicking off with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did video really kill the radio star, or just make it better?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis' seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: It's 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. What's your favourite track from this absolute Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, kicked off on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago today, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace and music. Which Woodstock performance is etched in your memory?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death (1977)
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Today marks 49 years since we lost the King, Elvis Presley. His music lives on. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Tupac Shakur tragically died (1996)
events.blurb: Remembering the influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was tragically shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, the music world lost a giant. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his enduring impact on hip-hop and beyond. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death (1970)
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Hendrix Forever
angles.copy: Today marks 56 years since the world lost the unparalleled talent of Jimi Hendrix. His guitar wizardry continues to inspire. What's your top Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is legendary, but which track from it is your personal favourite?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem he sang?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem for peace, 'Imagine', was released.

angles.name: Imagine 55th Anniversary
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A timeless message. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod, revolutionising how we carry and listen to music.

angles.name: iPod's 25th Birthday
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? 25 years ago, Apple put 1,000 songs in our pocket and changed music forever. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Celebrating James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Happy Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From iconic theme tunes to unforgettable gadgets, what's your favourite 007 moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles legend John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: John Lennon would have been 86 today. His music and message continue to resonate globally. What's the Lennon song that means the most to you?
